recommendations.title: Son
recommendations.overview: When a young boy contracts a mysterious illness, his mother must decide how far she will go to protect him from terrifying forces in her past.

recommendations.title: Seance
recommendations.overview: At an elite boarding school for girls, six friends jokingly engage in a late night ritual, calling forth the spirit of a dead former student who reportedly haunts their halls. Before morning, one of the girls is dead, leaving the others wondering wha

recommendations.title: V/H/S/94
recommendations.overview: After the discovery of a mysterious VHS tape, a brutish police SWAT team launches a high-intensity raid on a remote warehouse, only to discover a sinister cult compound whose collection of pre-recorded material uncovers a nightmarish conspiracy.
recommendations.director: Simon Barrett, Steven Kostanski, Chloe Okuno, Timo Tjahjanto, Jennifer Reeder, Ryan Prows

recommendations.title: Afflicted
recommendations.overview: Two friends' tour of Europe takes a dark turn when one of them contracts a mysterious illness. They race to find out what it is and how to cure it before the sickness consumes him completely.

recommendations.title: Always Shine
recommendations.overview: On a trip to Big Sur, two friends, both actresses, try to reconnect with one another. Once alone, the women's suppressed jealousies and deep-seated resentments begin to rise, causing them to lose their grasp on not only the true nature of their relat

recommendations.title: The Cremator
recommendations.overview: In 1930s Prague, a Czech cremator who firmly believes cremation relieves one from earthly suffering is drawn inexorably to Nazism.

recommendations.title: The Wild Goose Lake
recommendations.overview: A gangster ends up making a mistake that causes every gun on both sides of the law to point at him. While on the run, he comes across a mysterious woman who might get him out of trouble or make things worse.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/2
recommendations.overview: Inside a darkened house looms a column of TVs littered with VHS tapes, a pagan shrine to forgotten analog gods. The screens crackle and pop endlessly with monochrome vistas of static white noise permeating the brain and fogging concentration. But you
recommendations.director: Gareth Evans, Eduardo Sánchez, Timo Tjahjanto, Jason Eisener, Adam Wingard, Gregg Hale, Simon Barrett

recommendations.title: The Horseman on the Roof
recommendations.overview: In a time of war and disease, a young officer gallantly tries to help a young woman find her husband.

recommendations.title: Matriarch
recommendations.overview: Afflicted with a mysterious disease after surviving an overdose, a woman returns to her childhood home to confront her personal demons but instead discovers a real one.
